transcript.text: If you have ever opened YouTube, you've probably seen brainrot videos like this one. But, did you know that this one in particular generated over 240 million views and conservatively made over $15,000? [music] I'm not a fan of brainrot, and you're probably not a fan of brainrot, too. But, if we go on View Stats and search for the most popular YouTube short of this month, we'll see this that got almost 400 million views. Like, who's watching this crap? [music] Anyways, I just wanted to get your attention to the fact that uh faceless YouTube is making decent money, but believe me, we're doing it in a much healthier [music] way with a content that is actually enjoyable to watch and with the niches that actually worth it. So, if you want to see the exact niches we're going after, then uh >> [music] >> check this highlight on my page. >> [laughter]
